intention: 通过某种方式学习/做某事效果更好
naturalChunk: learn [sth] more effectively by doing sth
avoidSaying: get better effect in learning through read sth
sentencePatterns: I learn [subject] more effectively by [doing sth].
I find it more effective to [do sth] than to [do sth else].
realLifeExamples: I learn English more effectively by reading fables.
I find it more effective to review chunks daily than to memorize word lists.
productionPrompts: 你通过什么方式学英语效果最好？
